results.term: Hello. I am okay. I have been grieving the loss of...

turn_info.content: Hello. I am okay. I have been grieving the loss of my grandmother so I've been a little down lately.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: This happened in May. I had to think about it for a moment because I was thinking it was March. It was May. This year has completely thrown me off. She passed away in May.

results.term: I didn't reach out to her much. I regret that.
